# Q²M Tire Express









$23.99

Q²M Tire Express is a premium tire dressing designed to deliver a clean, satin tire finish with minimal effort. Its easy-to-apply formula restores the “factory fresh” look to tires while providing long-lasting protection.
This water-repellent tire dressing forms a durable, self-cleaning barrier that helps keep tires cleaner for longer, even during extended drives in rainy or wet conditions. Perfect for enthusiasts and professionals alike, Q²M Tire Express offers a reliable, no-fuss alternative to traditional tire shines and rubber dressings.

Hurry up! Sales Ends In

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/03348da7-4d73-495a-a06c-24e04984e1bb/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/best/) 
![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/d31348e1-a780-49ce-a768-84b4b7f90057/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/best/) 

# QUICK AND EASY APPLICATION

Being water based, it s extremely easy to apply and allows both a dry and wet application. It spreads on the surface very well with just one wipe and doesn t require rubbing into the surface like our SiO2 infused [Q Tire](https://gyeonusa.com/collections/tire-cleaning-dressings/products/q2-tire).

# HEALTHY MATTE FINISH

Q M Tire Express provides a very deep, natural and matte visual effect. It builds a repellent, self-cleaning layer that helps to keep the tire clean and will not diminish even during a long drive in rainy conditions.

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/f96deb6a-9ebf-4f8d-9ba0-fda9b0a25b01/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/best/) 

# PRO TIP

There is no easier way to refresh the look of your vehicle tires. With a simple and straight forward application, Q M TireExpress is the perfect frequent use dressing. 
TIP: To get the most out of the product, use it on a damp tire right after the wash. Spread it evenly and let dry. A subtle, factory fresh look will be the result.
**CONSUMPTION**: 10-15ml/ set
**DURABILITY**: >2 washes
